name: Model Router
description: Tiered model router for OpenClaw — picks the cheapest sufficient model per turn via heuristic + semantic kNN classification. Routes across Local Ollama, DeepSeek Flash, DeepSeek Pro, and Gemini Pro.

enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.help: When false the plugin loads but the before_model_resolve hook returns no override (gateway behavior unchanged).

enabled.description: Master kill switch for the router. When false, the hook is registered but always returns undefined.
